structure: Self-contained orchestrator (no helper): deletes Dim_PositionChangeLog where OccurredDateID>=target, reloads from snapshot etoro_History_PositionChangeLog WHERE Occurred>=target. Snapshot holds 2 days (06-21,06-22).
dialect_notes: Proc already DBSQL-clean (OccurredDateID via date_format, cast(IsSettled as int)). Pure autopoc clone, no patching needed.
